Home Curriculum Digests Newsletter

Welcome to SAP's Future of PMM Training

A guided learning program for product marketers navigating the AI transformation

What This Is

A hands-on curriculum with assessments, exercises, and practical frameworks you can apply immediately. Not a textbook to read — a learning journey to complete.

📚 Guided Learning

Each chapter builds on the last, with clear objectives and knowledge checks along the way.

🎯 Practical Focus

Real exercises using frameworks you'll apply to actual products and campaigns.

⏱️ Self-Paced

~8 hours total. Complete on your schedule — pick up where you left off anytime.

Why We Need This

The way buyers discover, evaluate, and purchase enterprise software has fundamentally changed. AI agents now mediate the research process. Committees make decisions with AI-generated shortlists. The old playbook — launch, enable, wait for leads — no longer works.

This program teaches the skills modern PMMs need to stay relevant and drive impact in the new era.

Curriculum Overview

Ch Title Summary Time Stage
1 The Skills We Will Teach Take the baseline assessment, understand the fundamental shifts in PMM, and preview your learning journey. 45 min Foundation
3 Visibility in the Age of Agents How AI agents discover and filter vendors. Building presence where LLMs look: structured data, authoritative content, entity relationships. 60 min Awareness
4 Shaping the AI-Mediated Shortlist Positioning that survives AI summarization. Competitive differentiation when buyers see synthesized comparisons, not your messaging. 60 min Consideration
5 Winning the Technical Deep Dive Enabling champions with the right proof points. Technical validation, demos, POCs, and content that closes capability gaps. 60 min Evaluation
6 Pricing, Packaging, Positioning Commercialization strategy for enterprise deals. Bundling, pricing tiers, competitive response, and value articulation. 75 min Commercialization
7 Closing in a Committee World Navigating multi-stakeholder decisions. Economic buyers, technical validators, procurement — and the content each needs. 60 min Decision
8 From Signed to Advocate Adoption, expansion, and customer marketing. Turning launches into renewals and customers into references. 60 min Adoption + Expansion
Total Program Time: ~8 hours

What You'll Walk Away With

  • A clear understanding of how AI is reshaping B2B buying behavior
  • Practical frameworks for positioning, GTM, and competitive strategy
  • Hands-on experience with exercises you can apply to real products
  • Confidence to lead product marketing in the new era
  • A certificate of completion to share with your team

Ready to Begin?

Start with Chapter 1 to take your baseline assessment and map your learning journey.

Start Chapter 1 →
